items.badge_description: At a new place and don't want to choose a pint of something you may not like? Grab a few tasters! Enjoy some small pours and then decide which to upgrade to a full pour. That's 35 checkins with the serving style of Taster. Try 5 more for Level 8! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast

A big juicy burger, some golden brown french fries, and a pint of your favorite brewskie. What more could you want? That's a beer at 5 different venus with the category of Burger Joint. Try 5 more for Level 2!
Ahh, the trusty pale ale; crisp, refreshing, and always a good choice in a bind. That's 180 different Pale Ales or American Pale Wheats. Try 5 more for Level 37.
You’ve unlocked today’s Recappd badge! Any drink qualifies as long as you check it in on January 14, 2026.

There's beer in them thar hills! You're setting off on your journey through the world of beer, but be sure to take a little time to get to know each brewery as you go. That's a beer from 60 different breweries. Try 5 more for Level 13!
Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 5 beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 2.

Everyone loves fresh beer, but obviously not as much as you do. You went straight to the source. 

That's a beer at 5 different venues categorized as a Brewery, Cidery or Meadery. Visit 5 more for Level 2!

items.checkin_comment: Not sure how to rate it.

user.bio: Rating beers depending on how they fit the style (BJCP), the condition, drinkabillity and if they have off-flavours.
Kopf sagt Sport, Herz sagt Bier.

items.badge_description: Fresh from the tap is one of the best ways to enjoy a beer. Just try to use a glass and not drink directly from the tap, as tempting as it may be. That's 80 checkins with the serving style of Draft. Try 5 more for Level 17!

user.bio: Rating beers depending on how they fit the style (BJCP), the condition, drinkabillity and if they have off-flavours.
Kopf sagt Sport, Herz sagt Bier.

items.badge_description: You’ve unlocked today’s Recappd badge! Any drink you check in helps power your faction as we race toward choosing the next Untappd icon. Explore your year in beer at Recappd and come back tomorrow!
Your quest to quench your thirst leaves no stone unturned! That's at least 210 distinct venues!

Wine isn't the only beverage worthy of pairing with a delicious meal. With so many styles widely available, there’s a perfect pint for any cuisine of your choosing. That's a beer at 45 different venues categorized as a Restaurant. Try 5 more for Level 10!
Had enough tea and biscuits? Head to the pub for a pint! That's at least 10 beers from the UK. Try 5 more for Level 3.

Everyone loves fresh beer, but obviously not as much as you do. You went straight to the source.
